initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    i_brand,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS catalog_sales_ext_sales_price,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales_ext_sales_price
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN web_sales 
        ON item.i_item_sk = web_sales.ws_item_sk 
        AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2002
GROUP BY 
    i_brand
ORDER BY 
    i_brand
LIMIT 100
